8.1.K562_external_validation

2024-05-16

Evaluation of divergent loci using fine-mapped GWAS variants, fine-mapped eQTLs, and CRISPRi data and comparison to other methods & assays.

library(GenomicRanges)
## Loading required package: stats4
## Loading required package: BiocGenerics
## 
## Attaching package: 'BiocGenerics'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     IQR, mad, sd, var, xtabs
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     anyDuplicated, aperm, append, as.data.frame, basename, cbind,
##     colnames, dirname, do.call, duplicated, eval, evalq, Filter, Find,
##     get, grep, grepl, intersect, is.unsorted, lapply, Map, mapply,
##     match, mget, order, paste, pmax, pmax.int, pmin, pmin.int,
##     Position, rank, rbind, Reduce, rownames, sapply, setdiff, sort,
##     table, tapply, union, unique, unsplit, which.max, which.min
## Loading required package: S4Vectors
## 
## Attaching package: 'S4Vectors'
## The following object is masked from 'package:utils':
## 
##     findMatches
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     expand.grid, I, unname
## Loading required package: IRanges
## Loading required package: GenomeInfoDb
library(readr)
library(rtracklayer)
library(parallel)
library(ggplot2)
library(GenomicFeatures)
## Loading required package: AnnotationDbi
## Loading required package: Biobase
## Welcome to Bioconductor
## 
##     Vignettes contain introductory material; view with
##     'browseVignettes()'. To cite Bioconductor, see
##     'citation("Biobase")', and for packages 'citation("pkgname")'.
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
## Loading required package: MatrixGenerics
## Loading required package: matrixStats
## 
## Attaching package: 'matrixStats'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:Biobase':
## 
##     anyMissing, rowMedians
## 
## Attaching package: 'MatrixGenerics'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:matrixStats':
## 
##     colAlls, colAnyNAs, colAnys, colAvgsPerRowSet, colCollapse,
##     colCounts, colCummaxs, colCummins, colCumprods, colCumsums,
##     colDiffs, colIQRDiffs, colIQRs, colLogSumExps, colMadDiffs,
##     colMads, colMaxs, colMeans2, colMedians, colMins, colOrderStats,
##     colProds, colQuantiles, colRanges, colRanks, colSdDiffs, colSds,
##     colSums2, colTabulates, colVarDiffs, colVars, colWeightedMads,
##     colWeightedMeans, colWeightedMedians, colWeightedSds,
##     colWeightedVars, rowAlls, rowAnyNAs, rowAnys, rowAvgsPerColSet,
##     rowCollapse, rowCounts, rowCummaxs, rowCummins, rowCumprods,
##     rowCumsums, rowDiffs, rowIQRDiffs, rowIQRs, rowLogSumExps,
##     rowMadDiffs, rowMads, rowMaxs, rowMeans2, rowMedians, rowMins,
##     rowOrderStats, rowProds, rowQuantiles, rowRanges, rowRanks,
##     rowSdDiffs, rowSds, rowSums2, rowTabulates, rowVarDiffs, rowVars,
##     rowWeightedMads, rowWeightedMeans, rowWeightedMedians,
##     rowWeightedSds, rowWeightedVars
## The following object is masked from 'package:Biobase':
## 
##     rowMedians
theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 10))
pooled.focus.samples <- c("K562_C","K562_N")
pooled.assay.names <- c("K562_C" = "CAGE divergent loci, cells",
                        "K562_N" = "CAGE divergent loci, nuclei")
pooled.DL.file <- "../3.DivergentLoci/poolSub.k562.summitDLs.rmSingletons.rds"

focus.samples = c("K562_C1","K562_C2","K562_C3","K562_N4","K562_N5","K562_N6")
assay.names = c("K562_C1" = "CAGE divergent loci, cells", "K562_C2" = "CAGE divergent loci, cells", "K562_C3" = "CAGE divergent loci, cells",
                "K562_N4" = "CAGE divergent loci, nuclei", "K562_N5" = "CAGE divergent loci, nuclei", "K562_N6" = "CAGE divergent loci, nuclei")
DL.file = "../3.DivergentLoci/repSub.k562.summitDLs.rmSingletons.rds"

SNP.file <- "../0.External_resources/all.bg.SNPs.hg38.baseline.v1.1.bed.sorted"
eQTL.file <- "../0.External_resources/GTEx_30tissues_release1_pip_01_Whole_Blood.tsv"
GWAS.file <- "../0.External_resources/UKBB_94traits_release1_pip02_clean_hg38.bed" ## Processed file

eQTL.pip.thres <- 0.5
GWAS.pip.thres <- 0.2
traits <- c("Plt","HbA1c","Hb","RBC","MCV","MCH","MCHC")

cCRE.file <- "../0.External_resources/ENCFF464BRU.bed"
ENCODErE2Gext.file <- "../0.External_resources/ENCFF202FID.bed.gz"
ENCODErE2G.file <- "../0.External_resources/ENCFF815ILK.bed.gz"
point.files <- c("PINTS GRO/PRO-cap, distal" = "../0.External_resources/K562_Distal_PINTS_GRO_PRO_cap.bed",
                 "PINTS GRO/PRO-cap, proximal" = "../0.External_resources/K562_Proximal_PINTS_GRO_PRO_cap.bed",
                 "dREG PRO-seq" = "../0.External_resources/GSE150625_PROseq_1M_K562_dREGpeaks_clean.bed",
                 "dREG qPRO-seq" = "../0.External_resources/GSE150625_qPROseq_1M_K562_dREGpeaks_clean.bed")

CRISPR.pos.file <- "../5.EPCrisprBenchmark/1.EPC.pos.gr.rds"
CRISPR.neg.file <- "../5.EPCrisprBenchmark/1.EPC.neg.notsig.gr.rds"

meena.thres <- 0.5
meena.pool.pos.file <- "../5.EPCrisprBenchmark/4.3.pos.proba.poolSub.csv"
meena.pool.neg.file <- "../5.EPCrisprBenchmark/4.3.neg.proba.poolSub.csv"
meena.rep.pos.file <- "../5.EPCrisprBenchmark/4.3.pos.proba.repSub.csv"
meena.rep.neg.file <- "../5.EPCrisprBenchmark/4.3.neg.proba.repSub.csv"

Read in data

txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene
cds <- unlist(cdsBy(txdb,"gene"))

## Background SNPs
SNP.data <- import.bed(SNP.file)
SNP.data <- sort(SNP.data)
olap <- findOverlaps(SNP.data,cds,minoverlap=1)
SNP.data <- SNP.data[-queryHits(olap)]

## Divergent loci
DLs <- readRDS(DL.file)
if (is.list(DLs))
  DLs <- do.call("c",DLs)
seqlevels(DLs, pruning.mode="coarse") <- seqlevels(SNP.data)
DLs <- DLs[DLs$sample %in% focus.samples]

## Divergent loci from pooled samples
pooled.DLs <- readRDS(pooled.DL.file)
if (is.list(pooled.DLs))
  pooled.DLs <- do.call("c",pooled.DLs)
seqlevels(pooled.DLs, pruning.mode="coarse") <- seqlevels(SNP.data)
pooled.DLs <- pooled.DLs[pooled.DLs$sample %in% pooled.focus.samples]

## eQTL data
eQTL.data <- read_tsv(eQTL.file,col_names=FALSE)[,c(1,3)]
## Rows: 52107 Columns: 3
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: "\t"
## chr (2): X1, X2
## dbl (1): X3
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
colnames(eQTL.data) <- c("variant","pip")
pos <- as.numeric(sapply(eQTL.data$variant, function(n) strsplit(n,"_")[[1]][2]))+1
eQTL.data <- GRanges(seqnames=as.character(sapply(eQTL.data$variant, function(n) strsplit(n,"_")[[1]][1])),
                     score=eQTL.data$pip,
                     ranges=IRanges(pos, pos))
eQTL.data <- sort(eQTL.data)
seqlevels(eQTL.data,pruning.mode="coarse") <- seqlevels(SNP.data)
eQTL.data <- subset(eQTL.data, score >= eQTL.pip.thres)
eQTL.data <- reduce(eQTL.data)
olap <- findOverlaps(eQTL.data,cds,minoverlap=1)
eQTL.data <- eQTL.data[-queryHits(olap)]

## GWAS data
GWAS.data <- import.bed(GWAS.file)
seqlevels(GWAS.data,pruning.mode="coarse") <- seqlevels(SNP.data)
olap <- findOverlaps(GWAS.data,cds,minoverlap=1)
GWAS.data <- GWAS.data[-queryHits(olap)]
GWAS.data <- subset(GWAS.data, name %in% traits)

trait.count.df <- do.call("rbind", lapply(traits, function(trait) {
  dat <- subset(GWAS.data, name==trait)
  dat <- sort(dat)
  dat <- unique(dat)
  as.data.frame(table(dat$name))
}))

trait.count.df
##    Var1 Freq
## 1   Plt 1005
## 2 HbA1c  646
## 3    Hb  566
## 4   RBC  774
## 5   MCV  855
## 6   MCH  820
## 7  MCHC  156
ggplot(trait.count.df, aes(Var1,Freq,label=Freq)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity") + geom_text(size=3)

ggsave(paste0("plots/K562_GWAS_trait_variant_count_PIP_",GWAS.pip.thres,".pdf"),width=3,height=3)

GWAS.data <- sort(GWAS.data)
GWAS.data$score <- NULL
GWAS.data$name <- NULL
GWAS.data <- unique(GWAS.data)

## Point estimate data

point.data <- lapply(names(point.files), function(n) import.bed(point.files[[n]]))
names(point.data) <- names(point.files)

cCRE <- read_tsv(cCRE.file,col_names=FALSE)
## Rows: 926535 Columns: 11
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: "\t"
## chr (6): X1, X4, X6, X9, X10, X11
## dbl (5): X2, X3, X5, X7, X8
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
df <- cCRE[,1:3]
colnames(df) <- c("chrom","start","end")
cCRE.data <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(df)
cCRE.data$class = cCRE[,10,drop=TRUE]

for (n in c("dELS","pELS","PLS")) {
  x <- subset(cCRE.data,class==n)
  x$class <- NULL
  point.data[[paste0("ENCODE cCRE, ",n)]] <- x
}

ENCODErE2G <- read_tsv(ENCODErE2G.file)
## Rows: 81506 Columns: 24
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: "\t"
## chr  (6): #chr, name, class, TargetGene, TargetGeneEnsemblID, CellType
## dbl (16): start, end, TargetGeneTSS, numTSSEnhGene.Feature, distanceToTSS.Fe...
## lgl  (2): isSelfPromoter, ubiquitousExpressedGene.Feature
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
ENCODErE2G <- subset(ENCODErE2G, !isSelfPromoter & (class != "promoter"))
ENCODErE2G <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(ENCODErE2G,seqnames.field = "#chr")

ENCODErE2Gext <- read_tsv(ENCODErE2Gext.file)
## Rows: 122316 Columns: 57
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: "\t"
## chr  (6): #chr, name, class, TargetGene, TargetGeneEnsemblID, CellType
## dbl (50): start, end, TargetGeneTSS, EpiMapScore.Feature, glsCoefficient.Fea...
## lgl  (1): isSelfPromoter
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
ENCODErE2Gext <- subset(ENCODErE2Gext, !isSelfPromoter & (class != "promoter"))
ENCODErE2Gext <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(ENCODErE2Gext,seqnames.field = "#chr")

point.data[["ENCODE-rE2G"]] <- ENCODErE2G
point.data[["ENCODE-rE2G (extended)"]] <- ENCODErE2Gext

for (n in names(point.data)) {
  point.data[[n]] <- sort(point.data[[n]])
  seqlevels(point.data[[n]],pruning.mode="coarse") <- seqlevels(SNP.data)
  point.data[[n]] <- reduce(point.data[[n]])
  olap <- findOverlaps(point.data[[n]],cds,minoverlap = 1)
  point.data[[n]] <- point.data[[n]][-queryHits(olap)]
}

## CRISPR data
CRISPR.pos.data <- readRDS(CRISPR.pos.file)
CRISPR.neg.data <- readRDS(CRISPR.neg.file)

## Meena predictions
meena.pool.pos <- read_csv(meena.pool.pos.file)
## Rows: 428 Columns: 5
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## dbl (5): C, N, 10MN, GC1, PC2
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
meena.pool.neg <- read_csv(meena.pool.neg.file)
## Rows: 3450 Columns: 5
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## dbl (5): C, N, 10MN, GC1, PC2
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
meena.rep.pos <- read_csv(meena.rep.pos.file)
## Rows: 428 Columns: 11
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## dbl (11): C1, C2, C3, N4, N5, N6, 10MN1, 10MN2, 10MN3, GC1, PC2
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
meena.rep.neg <- read_csv(meena.rep.neg.file)
## Rows: 3450 Columns: 11
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## dbl (11): C1, C2, C3, N4, N5, N6, 10MN1, 10MN2, 10MN3, GC1, PC2
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
meena.pooled.focus <- c("C" = "Meena pooled, cells", "N" = "Meena pooled, nuclei")
pooled.meena.df <- do.call("rbind", lapply(names(meena.pooled.focus), function(n) {
  fg.count <- sum(meena.pool.pos[,n]>=meena.thres,na.rm=TRUE)
  bg.count <- sum(meena.pool.neg[,n]>=meena.thres,na.rm=TRUE)
  data.frame(precision = fg.count / (fg.count + bg.count),
             recall = fg.count / nrow(meena.pool.pos),
             fg.count = fg.count,
             bg.count = bg.count,
             assay = meena.pooled.focus[n])
}))

meena.replicate.focus <- c("C1" = "Meena replicate, cells", "C2" = "Meena replicate, cells", 
                           "C3" = "Meena replicate, cells", "N4" = "Meena replicate, nuclei", 
                           "N5" = "Meena replicate, nuclei", "N6" = "Meena replicate, nuclei")
replicate.meena.df <- do.call("rbind", lapply(names(meena.replicate.focus), function(n) {
  fg.count <- sum(meena.rep.pos[,n]>=meena.thres,na.rm=TRUE)
  bg.count <- sum(meena.rep.neg[,n]>=meena.thres,na.rm=TRUE)
  data.frame(precision = fg.count / (fg.count + bg.count),
             recall = fg.count / nrow(meena.rep.pos),
             fg.count = fg.count,
             bg.count = bg.count,
             assay = meena.replicate.focus[n])
}))

mean.replicate.meena.df <- do.call("rbind", lapply(unique(meena.replicate.focus), function(n) {
  x <- subset(replicate.meena.df, assay==n)
  data.frame(precision = mean(x$precision),
             recall = mean(x$recall),
             fg.count = mean(x$fg.count),
             bg.count = mean(x$bg.count),
             assay = n)
}))

Calculate eQTL enrichment and recall

## Point estimates data

point.eQTL.df <- do.call("rbind", lapply(names(point.data), function(n) {
  fg.olap <- findOverlaps(eQTL.data, point.data[[n]], minoverlap=1)
  bg.olap <- findOverlaps(SNP.data, point.data[[n]], minoverlap=1)
  fg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(fg.olap)))
  bg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(bg.olap)))
  data.frame(enrichment=(fg.count/length(eQTL.data)) / (bg.count/length(SNP.data)),
             recall=fg.count/length(eQTL.data),
             fg.count=fg.count,
             bg.count=bg.count,
             assay=n)
}))

point.eQTL.df
##   enrichment     recall fg.count bg.count                       assay
## 1   7.384831 0.03288740      177    44151   PINTS GRO/PRO-cap, distal
## 2  26.644633 0.04403567      237    16385 PINTS GRO/PRO-cap, proximal
## 3  18.018250 0.05797101      312    31897                dREG PRO-seq
## 4  13.441172 0.07060572      380    52078               dREG qPRO-seq
## 5   6.834757 0.01151988       62    16710           ENCODE cCRE, dELS
## 6  18.474166 0.03214418      173    17250           ENCODE cCRE, pELS
## 7  36.764674 0.04087700      220    11023            ENCODE cCRE, PLS
## 8   6.860077 0.04347826      234    62834                 ENCODE-rE2G
## 9   6.329794 0.04384987      236    68680      ENCODE-rE2G (extended)
replicate.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data <- do.call("rbind", lapply(focus.samples, function(sample) {
  
  gr <- DLs[DLs$sample==sample]
  
  scores <- sort(unique(gr$score))
  
  gr.fg.olap <- findOverlaps(eQTL.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  gr.bg.olap <- findOverlaps(SNP.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  
  do.call("rbind", lapply(scores, function(sco) {
    
    selection <- which(gr$score>=sco)
    fg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.fg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.fg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    bg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.bg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.bg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    
    data.frame(enrichment=(fg.count/length(eQTL.data))/(bg.count/length(SNP.data)),
               recall=fg.count/length(eQTL.data),
               fg.count=fg.count,
               bg.count=bg.count,
               score=sco,
               sample=sample,
               assay=assay.names[sample])
  }))
}))

pooled.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data <- do.call("rbind", lapply(pooled.focus.samples, function(sample) {
  
  gr <- pooled.DLs[pooled.DLs$sample==sample]
  
  scores <- sort(unique(gr$score))
  
  gr.fg.olap <- findOverlaps(eQTL.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  gr.bg.olap <- findOverlaps(SNP.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  
  do.call("rbind", lapply(scores, function(sco) {
    
    selection <- which(gr$score>=sco)
    fg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.fg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.fg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    bg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.bg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.bg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    
    data.frame(enrichment=(fg.count/length(eQTL.data))/(bg.count/length(SNP.data)),
               recall=fg.count/length(eQTL.data),
               fg.count=fg.count,
               bg.count=bg.count,
               score=sco,
               sample=sample,
               assay=pooled.assay.names[sample])
  }))
}))

Calculate GWAS enrichment and recall

point.GWAS.df <- do.call("rbind", lapply(names(point.data), function(n) {
  fg.olap <- findOverlaps(GWAS.data, point.data[[n]], minoverlap=1)
  bg.olap <- findOverlaps(SNP.data, point.data[[n]], minoverlap=1)
  fg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(fg.olap)))
  bg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(bg.olap)))
  data.frame(enrichment=(fg.count/length(GWAS.data)) / (bg.count/length(SNP.data)),
             recall=fg.count/length(GWAS.data),
             fg.count=fg.count,
             bg.count=bg.count,
             assay=n)
}))

point.GWAS.df
##   enrichment     recall fg.count bg.count                       assay
## 1   8.338530 0.03713458      141    44151   PINTS GRO/PRO-cap, distal
## 2   8.445792 0.01395839       53    16385 PINTS GRO/PRO-cap, proximal
## 3   8.185800 0.02633658      100    31897                dREG PRO-seq
## 4   7.520521 0.03950487      150    52078               dREG qPRO-seq
## 5  13.437948 0.02264946       86    16710           ENCODE cCRE, dELS
## 6   8.476369 0.01474849       56    17250           ENCODE cCRE, pELS
## 7  10.896047 0.01211483       46    11023            ENCODE cCRE, PLS
## 8   7.770659 0.04924941      187    62834                 ENCODE-rE2G
## 9   7.489398 0.05188307      197    68680      ENCODE-rE2G (extended)
replicate.GWAS.enrichment.recall.data <- do.call("rbind", lapply(focus.samples, function(sample) {
  
  gr <- DLs[DLs$sample==sample]
  
  scores <- sort(unique(gr$score))
  
  gr.fg.olap <- findOverlaps(GWAS.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  gr.bg.olap <- findOverlaps(SNP.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  
  do.call("rbind", lapply(scores, function(sco) {
    
    selection <- which(gr$score>=sco)
    fg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.fg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.fg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    bg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.bg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.bg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    
    data.frame(enrichment=(fg.count/length(GWAS.data))/(bg.count/length(SNP.data)),
               recall=fg.count/length(GWAS.data),
               fg.count=fg.count,
               bg.count=bg.count,
               score=sco,
               sample=sample,
               assay=assay.names[sample])
  }))
}))

pooled.GWAS.enrichment.recall.data <- do.call("rbind", lapply(pooled.focus.samples, function(sample) {
  
  gr <- pooled.DLs[pooled.DLs$sample==sample]
  
  scores <- sort(unique(gr$score))
  
  gr.fg.olap <- findOverlaps(GWAS.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  gr.bg.olap <- findOverlaps(SNP.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  
  do.call("rbind", lapply(scores, function(sco) {
    
    selection <- which(gr$score>=sco)
    fg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.fg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.fg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    bg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.bg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.bg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    
    data.frame(enrichment=(fg.count/length(GWAS.data))/(bg.count/length(SNP.data)),
               recall=fg.count/length(GWAS.data),
               fg.count=fg.count,
               bg.count=bg.count,
               score=sco,
               sample=sample,
               assay=pooled.assay.names[sample])
  }))
}))

Calculate CRISPR precision and recall

point.CRISPR.df <- do.call("rbind", lapply(names(point.data), function(n) {
  fg.olap <- findOverlaps(CRISPR.pos.data, point.data[[n]], minoverlap=1)
  bg.olap <- findOverlaps(CRISPR.neg.data, point.data[[n]], minoverlap=1)
  fg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(fg.olap)))
  bg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(bg.olap)))
  data.frame(precision=fg.count/(fg.count+bg.count),
             recall=fg.count/length(CRISPR.pos.data),
             fg.count=fg.count,
             bg.count=bg.count,
             assay=n)
}))

point.CRISPR.df
##   precision      recall fg.count bg.count                       assay
## 1 0.1716885 0.705607477      302     1457   PINTS GRO/PRO-cap, distal
## 2 0.1250000 0.007009346        3       21 PINTS GRO/PRO-cap, proximal
## 3 0.2092391 0.359813084      154      582                dREG PRO-seq
## 4 0.1852792 0.511682243      219      963               dREG qPRO-seq
## 5 0.2002946 0.635514019      272     1086           ENCODE cCRE, dELS
## 6 0.2343750 0.070093458       30       98           ENCODE cCRE, pELS
## 7 0.2222222 0.004672897        2        7            ENCODE cCRE, PLS
## 8 0.1998762 0.754672897      323     1293                 ENCODE-rE2G
## 9 0.1770509 0.796728972      341     1585      ENCODE-rE2G (extended)
replicate.CRISPR.precision.recall.data <- do.call("rbind", lapply(focus.samples, function(sample) {
  
  gr <- DLs[DLs$sample==sample]
  
  scores <- sort(unique(gr$score))
  
  gr.fg.olap <- findOverlaps(CRISPR.pos.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  gr.bg.olap <- findOverlaps(CRISPR.neg.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  
  do.call("rbind", lapply(scores, function(sco) {
    
    selection <- which(gr$score>=sco)
    fg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.fg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.fg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    bg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.bg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.bg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    
    data.frame(precision=fg.count/(fg.count+bg.count),
               recall=fg.count/length(CRISPR.pos.data),
               fg.count=fg.count,
               bg.count=bg.count,
               score=sco,
               sample=sample,
               assay=assay.names[sample])
  }))
}))

pooled.CRISPR.precision.recall.data <- do.call("rbind", lapply(pooled.focus.samples, function(sample) {
  
  gr <- pooled.DLs[pooled.DLs$sample==sample]
  
  scores <- sort(unique(gr$score))
  
  gr.fg.olap <- findOverlaps(CRISPR.pos.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  gr.bg.olap <- findOverlaps(CRISPR.neg.data, gr, minoverlap=1)
  
  do.call("rbind", lapply(scores, function(sco) {
    
    selection <- which(gr$score>=sco)
    fg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.fg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.fg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    bg.count <- length(unique(queryHits(gr.bg.olap)[which(subjectHits(gr.bg.olap) %in% selection)]))
    
    data.frame(precision=fg.count/(fg.count+bg.count),
               recall=fg.count/length(CRISPR.pos.data),
               fg.count=fg.count,
               bg.count=bg.count,
               score=sco,
               sample=sample,
               assay=pooled.assay.names[sample])
  }))
}))

Plot eQTL results

max.enr <- min(c(max(c(replicate.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data$enrichment,point.eQTL.df$enrichment),na.rm=TRUE),75))
min.enr <- min(c(replicate.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data$enrichment,point.eQTL.df$enrichment),na.rm=TRUE)

ggplot(replicate.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data, aes(recall, enrichment, color=assay)) + geom_line(aes(group=sample)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(min.enr,max.enr)) + geom_point(data=point.eQTL.df)

ggsave(paste0("plots/K562_replicate_eQTL_enrichment_vs_recall_PIP_",eQTL.pip.thres,".pdf"),width=7,height=5)

eQTL.r <- sapply(focus.samples, function(n) max(subset(replicate.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data,sample==n)$recall,na.rm=TRUE))
eQTL.mean.enrichment <- sapply(focus.samples, function(n) mean(subset(replicate.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data,sample==n & recall<=min(eQTL.r))$enrichment, na.rm=TRUE))
replicate.eQTL.df <- data.frame(mean_enrichment=eQTL.mean.enrichment,
                                max_recall=eQTL.r,
                                sample=focus.samples,
                                assay=assay.names)

replicate.eQTL.df
##         mean_enrichment max_recall  sample                       assay
## K562_C1        46.96004 0.06168711 K562_C1  CAGE divergent loci, cells
## K562_C2        51.25005 0.06800446 K562_C2  CAGE divergent loci, cells
## K562_C3        47.18389 0.06187291 K562_C3  CAGE divergent loci, cells
## K562_N4        37.58758 0.08454106 K562_N4 CAGE divergent loci, nuclei
## K562_N5        37.52580 0.08119658 K562_N5 CAGE divergent loci, nuclei
## K562_N6        38.11499 0.08472687 K562_N6 CAGE divergent loci, nuclei
ggplot(replicate.eQTL.df,aes(sample,mean_enrichment)) + geom_bar(stat="identity") + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90,vjust=0.5,hjust=1))

ggsave(paste0("plots/K562_replicate_eQTL_mean_enrichment_PIP_",eQTL.pip.thres,".pdf"),width=1.5,height=3)

ggplot(replicate.eQTL.df,aes(sample,max_recall)) + geom_bar(stat="identity") + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90,vjust=0.5,hjust=1))

ggsave(paste0("plots/K562_replicate_eQTL_max_recall_PIP_",eQTL.pip.thres,".pdf"),width=1.5,height=3)
max.enr <- min(c(max(c(pooled.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data$enrichment,point.eQTL.df$enrichment),na.rm=TRUE),75))
min.enr <- min(c(pooled.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data$enrichment,point.eQTL.df$enrichment),na.rm=TRUE)

ggplot(pooled.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data, aes(recall, enrichment, color=assay)) + geom_line(aes(group=sample)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(min.enr,max.enr)) + geom_point(data=point.eQTL.df)

ggsave(paste0("plots/K562_pooled_eQTL_enrichment_vs_recall_PIP_",eQTL.pip.thres,".pdf"),width=7,height=5)

eQTL.r <- sapply(pooled.focus.samples, function(n) max(subset(pooled.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data,sample==n)$recall,na.rm=TRUE))
eQTL.mean.enrichment <- sapply(pooled.focus.samples, function(n) mean(subset(pooled.eQTL.enrichment.recall.data,sample==n & recall<=min(eQTL.r))$enrichment, na.rm=TRUE))
pooled.eQTL.df <- data.frame(mean_enrichment=eQTL.mean.enrichment,
                             max_recall=eQTL.r,
                             sample=pooled.focus.samples,
                             assay=assay.names)
## Warning in data.frame(mean_enrichment = eQTL.mean.enrichment, max_recall =
## eQTL.r, : row names were found from a short variable and have been discarded
pooled.eQTL.df
##   mean_enrichment max_recall sample                       assay
## 1        45.93062 0.08658491 K562_C  CAGE divergent loci, cells
## 2        37.42934 0.11519881 K562_N  CAGE divergent loci, cells
## 3        45.93062 0.08658491 K562_C  CAGE divergent loci, cells
## 4        37.42934 0.11519881 K562_N CAGE divergent loci, nuclei
## 5        45.93062 0.08658491 K562_C CAGE divergent loci, nuclei
## 6        37.42934 0.11519881 K562_N CAGE divergent loci, nuclei
ggplot(pooled.eQTL.df,aes(sample,mean_enrichment)) + geom_bar(stat="identity") + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90,vjust=0.5,hjust=1))

ggsave(paste0("plots/K562_pooled_eQTL_mean_enrichment_PIP_",eQTL.pip.thres,".pdf"),width=1.5,height=3)

ggplot(pooled.eQTL.df,aes(sample,max_recall)) + geom_bar(stat="identity") + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90,vjust=0.5,hjust=1))

ggsave(paste0("plots/K562_pooled_eQTL_max_recall_PIP_",eQTL.pip.thres,".pdf"),width=1.5,height=3)

Plot GWAS results

max.enr <- min(c(max(c(replicate.GWAS.enrichment.recall.data$enrichment,point.GWAS.df$enrichment),na.rm=TRUE),15))
min.enr <- min(c(replicate.GWAS.enrichment.recall.data$enrichment,point.GWAS.df$enrichment),na.rm=TRUE)

  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(min.enr,max.enr)) + geom_point(data=point.GWAS.df)

GWAS.r <- sapply(focus.samples, function(n) max(subset(replicate.GWAS.enrichment.recall.data,sample==n)$recall,na.rm=TRUE))
GWAS.mean.enrichment <- sapply(focus.samples, function(n) mean(subset(replicate.GWAS.enrichment.recall.data,sample==n & recall<=min(GWAS.r))$enrichment, na.rm=TRUE))

Plot CRISPR results

meena.df <- as.data.frame(rbind(mean.replicate.meena.df,pooled.meena.df))

meena.df
##   precision    recall fg.count  bg.count                   assay
## 1 0.2180097 0.4898754 209.6667  751.3333  Meena replicate, cells
## 2 0.1849794 0.6876947 294.3333 1298.3333 Meena replicate, nuclei
## C 0.1914766 0.7453271 319.0000 1347.0000     Meena pooled, cells
## N 0.1537812 0.8504673 364.0000 2003.0000    Meena pooled, nuclei
max.prec <- min(c(max(c(replicate.CRISPR.precision.recall.data$precision,point.CRISPR.df$precision),na.rm=TRUE),0.5))
min.prec <- min(c(replicate.CRISPR.precision.recall.data$precision,point.CRISPR.df$precision),na.rm=TRUE)

ggplot(replicate.CRISPR.precision.recall.data, aes(recall, precision, color=assay)) + geom_line(aes(group=sample)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(min.prec,max.prec)) + geom_point(data=point.CRISPR.df) + geom_point(data=meena.df) + geom_text(aes(recall,precision,label=assay),data=meena.df,size=2)

ggsave("plots/K562_replicate_CRISPR_precision_vs_recall.pdf",width=7,height=5)

max.prec <- min(c(max(c(pooled.CRISPR.precision.recall.data$precision,point.CRISPR.df$precision),na.rm=TRUE),0.5))
min.prec <- min(c(pooled.CRISPR.precision.recall.data$precision,point.CRISPR.df$precision),na.rm=TRUE)

ggplot(pooled.CRISPR.precision.recall.data, aes(recall, precision, color=assay)) + geom_line(aes(group=sample)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(min.prec,max.prec)) + geom_point(data=rbind(point.CRISPR.df,meena.df)) + geom_text(aes(recall,precision,label=assay),data=meena.df,size=2)

ggsave("plots/K562_pooled_CRISPR_precision_vs_recall.pdf",width=7,height=5)
